task_name: add Mistral Instruct v3 chat template

details.reasoning: The implementation successfully adds the mistral-instruct-v3 handler with most requirements met: the static function is present, jinja template wraps messages with [INST]/[/INST], system messages are prepended to the first user turn, eos_token is appended after assistant turns, template auto-detection is properly registered with [SYSTEM_PROMPT] absence check, LOG_DBG call is present, handler is dispatched correctly with (tmpl, params), and no existing code is modified. However, there is one critical issue: the handler uses COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_PEG_NATIVE instead of the required COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_CONTENT_ONLY. This is a material deviation from the rubric specification that affects the format type of the implementation.
